info.title: Context Public API
info.description: Public API for the Context prediction market platform. Provides endpoints for markets, orders, portfolio, and balance management.

apiKey.description: API key passed as Bearer token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of markets. Supports sorting by volume, trending, new, ending, or chance.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order for the markets list

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Comma-separated status filter (active, pending, resolved, closed)

parameters.name: resolutionStatus
parameters.description: Comma-separated resolution status filter (none, pending, resolved)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query to filter markets by question text

get.description: Returns a single market by ID (hash) or slug.
Returns recent activity for a market including trades, oracle updates, resolutions, and market creation events.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated activity types to filter (trade, oracle_update, resolution, market_created)

get.description: Returns the oracle resolution summary for a market, including evidence collected and sources monitored.
Returns completed oracle probability quotes for a market.

post.description: Triggers a new oracle probability quote for a market. Rate limited to one request per 5 minutes per market.

get.description: Returns current bid, ask, and last trade prices for yes and no outcomes.
Returns the order book depth with aggregated price levels in cents.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Number of price levels to return per side

post.description: Simulates a trade and returns estimated execution details. This is a read-only operation.

get.description: Returns historical price data for a market.
Returns a paginated feed of activity across all markets including trades, oracle updates, resolutions, and market creation events.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated activity types (trade, oracle_update, resolution, market_created)

post.description: Submits a new limit or market order. The order type is determined by a discriminator field.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders. At least one of trader or marketId is required.
Returns a single order by numeric ID or order hash.
Returns orders created within a sliding time window. Useful for monitoring recent activity.

parameters.name: windowSeconds
parameters.description: Time window in seconds to look back

post.description: Atomically cancels an existing order and creates a new one. Both operations must reference the same trader.
Executes a batch of create and cancel operations atomically. All operations succeed or all fail.
Creates multiple orders in a single atomic batch.
Cancels multiple orders in a single batch.
Cancels a single order by trader, nonce, and signature.
Simulates how an order would execute against the current orderbook. Returns fill levels, fees, and collateral requirements.

get.description: Returns paginated portfolio positions for an address, with optional filters by market or holding type.
Returns the current portfolio value and percent change for an address.
Returns positions that can be claimed (redeemed) after market resolution.

post.description: Mints test USDC tokens to an address. Rate limited to 3 mints and 5000 USDC per day per API key.

get.description: Returns a summary of USDC and outcome token balances for an address.
Returns the balance of a specific token for an address.
Returns the settlement contract balance for a specific token and address.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Create, list, and manage orders (requires API key)

tags.name: Portfolio
tags.description: View portfolio positions and stats (requires API key)

tags.name: Balance
tags.description: Query token balances and mint test USDC (requires API key)
